job_summary: An Investigator Site Manager (ISM) oversees all operational aspects of clinical trials at a specific site, ensuring efficient study execution and compliance.
key_responsibilities: Manage site staff and research teams
Ensure compliance with protocols and regulations
Coordinate with sponsors, CROs, and monitors
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
career_path: Site Manager → Regional Site Manager → Clinical Operations Manager
skills_required: coordinate with sponsors, cros, and monitors
ensure compliance with protocols and regulations
manage site staff and research teams
